ModMetaData.name: Outerm English Translation
ModMetaData.author: Darren Cheng
ModMetaData.description:
English translation patch for [Aya] Outerm Race.
This mod translates the Outerm race, xenotype content, faction text, incidents, apparel, weapons, research, hediffs, backstories, and other in-game text into English for RimWorld 1.6.
The translation in this mod was produced with the help of LLM GPT-5.4.
This patch was made because the Translation mod by WRelick is not updated yet, and I needed to understand what the Outerm mod was doing while working on the Combat Extended patch in my Ayameduki CE addon.
It also includes a small compatibility DLL that fixes several hardcoded or improperly exposed strings from the original mod, including weapon growth text and Outerm skill gizmo cooldown and unlock text.
